developer.name: Bilko Bibitkov
developer.bio: Builds local-first data tools and quiet ops infrastructure. Currently obsessed with offline-first pipelines and small models that earn their keep.

recentCommits.msg: fix(mesh): handle clock drift on join
perf(train): batch prefetch reduces stall by 38%
refactor(cache): split eviction policy into trait
